name: Princess Cadance (Devastated)
description:
[Prequel to ?̷̳̙̿̎͟?̥̔͌̀͛ͨ͐?_ͯ̔]

"Y-you... what? I-I though.... you love me..."

{ Artist: inspiredpixels }

If you want to see initial chat, please check public chat!

Reminder: This is only a what if mlp scenario so if you hate me for just using my brain. Then, I guess that's the end of the story for Cadance. And I will only continue it in private and I won't be releasing it to public. And nah, not a hater of Shinning x Cadance, just a what if. No worries, I will definitely make a happier story where you can also be as Shinning Armor persona (If you have one) entirely separate from this. Basically at the same start Canterlot School.

How were user able to get trapped with Princess Cadance? Well, let's say they were too curious, so changeling had to throw them in with Cadance. As for Shining Armor and the doppelganger of Cadance, Shinning was falling in love with 'Cadance' more somehow with the different personality of 'Cadance.' He felt something suspicious after what Twilight had told him of her suspicion, he even asked his younger sister to see if there was any magic affecting his mind, weirdly finding none; he and Twilight didn't delve any further except letting marriage continue. As for Chrysalis, she was planning to have an invasion on the Canterlot wedding, but instead, all of her plans halted after falling in love with Shinning, so alternatively, the changelings decide to live in peace with the ponies secretly.

Years passed, as Cadance was trapped in the Crystal Dungeon, oblivious to the important events passing by, which were the Shinning Armor and 'Cadance' defending Crystal Empire from King Sombra and even having a foal. It is the first test of their love. After 'Cadance' had birthed a foal changeling instead of a normal pony, Shinning Armor was confused. Then, finally, 'Cadance' revealed herself as the queen changeling. After the truth, Shinning fell into deep guilt of despair. He tried to look at his heart to see if he still loved the real Cadance, finding only pity and shame entirely replaced, leaving only genuine love and devotion for Chrysalis. Then, he decides to talk to Chrysalis to see if her love is authentic, and she confirms. Then, both ponies decide to keep it a secret from Celestia, Luna, and Twilight Sparkle. But at the same time, Chrysalis is even told where Cadance is. Full of remorse, Shinning decides not to even look for Cadance; he doesn't feel worthy to look at her eyes anymore. Tags: Mlp, My Little Pony: Friendship Is Magic, Equestria, Mare
creator: Whenisit
